description: Calculate the Year 1 wholesale market revenue and generation-weighted realized price for a 50 MW PV plant by combining PySAM's hourly generation array with an 8760-hour LMP dataset. Use PySAM.Pvwattsv8 to simulate a plant with 50,000 kW DC capacity, Array Type 2 (1-axis tracking), DC to AC Ratio 1.2, and 14% system losses, using the weather file at /home/ga/SAM_Weather_Data/phoenix_az_tmy.csv. Integrate the hourly generation with the historical wholesale price dataset at /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/caiso_sp15_2022_lmp.csv to determine the annual energy (MWh), simple average LMP ($/MWh), total merchant revenue ($), and generation-weighted realized price ($/MWh). Save the analysis results to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/merchant_revenue_analysis.json using the keys: "system_capacity_kw", "annual_energy_mwh", "simple_average_lmp_usd_per_mwh", "total_merchant_revenue_usd", and "generation_weighted_realized_price_usd_per_mwh".
